fn id() { x }
---
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
==========
fn suspend() { thunk x }
---
Fn(name="suspend", body=Thunk(Variable("x")))
==========
fn resume() { force job }
---
Fn(name="resume", body=Force(Variable("job")))
==========
fn id() { x }
---
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
==========
fn main() { let x = y; x }
---
Fn(name="main", body=Block([let x = Variable("y")], result=Variable("x")))
==========
fn id() { let x = y; z }
---
Fn(name="id", body=Block([let x = Variable("y")], result=Variable("z")))
==========
fn id() { let x = y; x }
---
Fn(name="id", body=Block([let x = Variable("y")], result=Variable("x")))
==========
fn main() { let x = { let y = z; y }; x }
---
Fn(name="main", body=Block([let x = Block([let y = Variable("z")], result=Variable("y"))], result=Variable("x")))
==========
fn id() = x
---
Fn(name="id", body=Variable("x"))
==========
fn greet() = "hello"
---
Fn(name="greet", body=String("hello"))
==========
fn complex() = { let x = y; x }
---
Fn(name="complex", body=Block([let x = Variable("y")], result=Variable("x")))
